name: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
overview: To secure the mansion, Tiwari pretends to marry Anita while Vibhuti pairs up with Angoori, but their ruse falls apart when Gayatri Devi recovers and Vidya Sister-in-law's ghost traps them in Ghunghatganj.

trailers.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai 2.0 | New Launch | Promo | From 22nd Dec, Mon–Fri 10:30 PM, sirf &TV aur ZEE5
